## Fixed

- **Invalid JSON bridge responses now fail with a clear error.** A bridge HTTP
  response that reports success but carries an invalid or empty JSON body used
  to surface later as a confusing `TypeError` when the command result was
  read. Both bridge-client transports (fetch and the abortable HTTP path) now
  reject immediately with "Bridge returned an invalid JSON response".

## Maintenance

- Full-codebase bug review of the extension background worker, content
  scripts, native host, bridge client, OpenCode plugin, workspace artifact
  writer, and installer scripts. Behavioral probes over navigation-policy
  matching, key event synthesis, schedule recurrence, and page-scope
  canonicalization confirmed no further functional defects.
- Removed an unused `rm` import from the workspace artifact writer.
- Package, lockfile, manifest, popup, bridge client, native host, smoke
  fixtures, and release verification report version 1.4.2 together.

## Verification

- 457 automated tests passing
- Release artifact scan clean (68 tracked files)
- Native host command/event and 9 MiB response smoke tests passing
- npm audit reports 0 vulnerabilities

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pmgallardodev/opencode-chrome-bridge/compare/v1.4.1...v1.4.2
